article_meta.title: Federal immigration officers board an elevator with respondents at immigration court in New York on 17 November 2025

reasoning: The summary largely avoids the article’s loaded framing, replaces charged terms with neutral wording, and attributes critical characterizations to sources. One minor lapse is an unattributed phrase about broader concerns of “suppression of activists,” but overall the tone is measured and more neutral than the source.

custom_reasoning.spin: Uses neutral verbs (e.g., “accessed,” “characterized,” “defended”) and avoids the source’s charged terms like “spied” except when clearly attributed.
custom_reasoning.unsubstantiated_claims: Notes lack of provided evidence as reported by the article and attributes criticisms to advocates; avoids declaring contested outcomes as fact.
custom_reasoning.opinion_as_fact: Evaluations (overreach, criminalization) are attributed to critics; only slight drift with “suppression of activists” as a generalized concern.
custom_reasoning.sensationalism: No dramatic or alarmist language; tone is restrained.
custom_reasoning.mudslinging: No personal attacks in the model’s voice.
custom_reasoning.mind_reading: No claims about internal motives or intentions.
custom_reasoning.slant: Includes both law enforcement and critics’ perspectives, plus DOJ defense; proportionally reflects the article’s emphasis without amplifying one side.
custom_reasoning.bias_by_omission: Captures all major perspectives present (FBI/NYPD/DOJ, activists, civil liberties, transparency org, public officials).
custom_reasoning.subjective_adjectives: Avoids loaded adjectives; language remains descriptive.
custom_reasoning.word_choice: Politically neutral terms throughout; avoids ideologically charged labels.
custom_reasoning.negativity_bias: Does not overemphasize negative elements beyond the article’s content; includes DOJ defense and NYPD context.
custom_reasoning.elite_populist_bias: Treats official and activist sources with similar neutrality and attribution.
custom_reasoning.framing_neutrality: Clearly more neutral than the Guardian’s framing, with careful attribution of claims.
custom_reasoning.perspective_completeness: Lists all key source types and reflects their positions proportionally.
